/CAL:DA MTR FILING/X:NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION IS FILED,/09    DTS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S11/TBH:20003030/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/X:BAILIS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/

/CAL:SENTENCE/AJW/CH1:SP 3 Y:U:ESS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 221 D/CTS: 221/CTORD:SHOULD PROBATION BE REVOKED, THE 3 YEAR STATE PRISON SUSPENDED SENTENCE AS TO COUNTS 1 AND 2 WOULD RUN CONSECUTIVE/X:AS TO COUNT 3, THE ESS IS THREE YEARS, THE UPPER TERM HOWEVER IT WOULD RUN CONCURRRENT TO COUNT 1 & 2/ /X:TOTAL6 YEARS STATE PRISON, EXECUTION OF SENTENCE SUSPENDED/CTORD:MISDEMEANOR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE IMPOSED TODAY FOR COUNTS 4 THROUGH 11 SHALL RUN CONCURRENT TO COUNTS 1, 2 & 3/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/STATES/WEAP/IND/WS/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/ /COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/VF2:150/CTORD:ALL APPLICABLEFINES & FEES AS TO MISDEMEANOR COUNTS SHALL BE IMPOSED/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY ADULTPROBATION DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY APD//CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/ /X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:AS PART OF THE GPS REQUIREMENT, THE DEFENDANT SHALL SUBMIT TO DRUG TESTING, POSESS NO WEAPONS, SHALL CONSUME NO DRUGS OR ALCOHOL WITHOUT A PRESCRIPTION, SHALL REMAIN IN THE HEALTHRIGHT360 PROGRAM  EXCEPT FOR COURT & ANY ACTIVITIES AS DETERMINED BY HEALTHRIGHT360/CTORD:PTD IS RELIEVED/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & STATUS OF PROGRAM/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD//CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP AND TRANSPORT-DIRECTLY TO HEALTH RIGHT 360/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:SENTENCING DATEOF 07-05-19 IS CONFIRMED/CONTD: SENTENCING/DOP/
/CAL:SHERIFF'S WARRANT AND STATUS OF PROGRAM (HEALTHRITE 360)/DEF:IS REFERRED TO ACM ICR FOR RELEASE TO HEALTRITE 360,/  /TWS/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF &STATUS OF PROGRAM (HEALTH RITE)/DOP/

/CAL:ACM ELIG REPORT/MO GRTD/DEF:TO BE TRANSPORTED BY ACM TO JERICHO PROJECT ON 05-28-19 WITH GPS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE VAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SENTENCING ON 07-05-19 IS CONFIRMED,/
